languages.text: Найден тайный вокс-передатчик. Искусное исполнение выдает высокий статус его владельца.

traits.locale_text: Найден тайный вокс-передатчик. Искусное исполнение выдает высокий статус его владельца.

languages.text: A clandestine vox-transmitter has been discovered. Its cunning workmanship indicates the high station of its owner.
languages.original_text: Найден тайный вокс-передатчик. Искусное исполнение выдает высокий статус его владельца.

traits.locale_text: A clandestine vox-transmitter has been discovered. The cunning of its workmanship bespeaks the high station of its owner.

languages.text: Ein geheimer Vox-Transmitter wurde entdeckt. Sein raffiniertes Design deutet auf den hohen Rang seines Besitzers hin.
languages.original_text: A clandestine vox-transmitter has been discovered. Its cunning workmanship indicates the high station of its owner.

traits.locale_text: Ein geheimer Vox-Transmitter wurde entdeckt. Sein raffiniertes Design deutet auf den hohen Rang seines Besitzers hin.

languages.text: Un transmetteur-vox clandestin a été découvert. Sa conception ingénieuse trahit le rang élevé de son propriétaire.
languages.original_text: A clandestine vox-transmitter has been discovered. Its cunning workmanship indicates the high station of its owner.

traits.locale_text: Un transmetteur-vox clandestin a été découvert. Sa conception ingénieuse trahit le rang élevé de son propriétaire.

languages.text: 发现了一台暗藏的音阵传输器，其精巧的工艺说明拥有者身份显赫。
languages.original_text: A clandestine vox-transmitter has been discovered. Its cunning workmanship indicates the high station of its owner.

traits.locale_text: 发现了一台暗藏的音阵传输器，其精巧的工艺说明拥有者身份显赫。

languages.text: Se ha descubierto un vocotransmisor clandestino. Su ingenioso diseño indica que su propietario ostenta un rango elevado.
languages.original_text: A clandestine vox-transmitter has been discovered. Its cunning workmanship indicates the high station of its owner.

traits.locale_text: Se ha descubierto un vocotransmisor clandestino. Su ingenioso diseño indica que su propietario ostenta un rango elevado.

languages.text: 北側の壁から秘密の発信器が発見された。その巧みな細工は、持ち主の身分の高さを物語っている。
languages.original_text: A secret vox-transmitter was found on the north wall. Its skilful workmanship gives away the high status of its owner.

languages.text: Gizli bir voks vericisi bulundu. Kurnazca işçiliği, sahibinin yüksek mevkisini gösteriyor.
languages.original_text: A clandestine vox-transmitter has been discovered. Its cunning workmanship indicates the high station of its owner.

traits.locale_text: Gizli bir voks vericisi bulundu. Kurnazca işçiliği, sahibinin yüksek mevkisini gösteriyor.
